text: Learning a new skill takes time and effort. The most important thing is consistent practice, even if it's just ten minutes a day. Patience is also necessary because you won't see immediate results—mistakes are part of the process. Use different resources like online tutorials, books, or classes to help you understand the basics more deeply. To stay motivated, track your progress, for example, by keeping a journal of what you learn each week. This shows you how far you've come, which gives you confidence and the motivation to continue. Remember, every expert was once a beginner.
